name: 暗影步
description: 选择地图上一个未被遮挡的格子，在下个回合开始的时候传送
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 10, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === targetPosition.x && t.y === targetPosition.y); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) { return { message: '目标位置不可行走', success: false }; } const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetPosition.x && p.y === targetPosition.y && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { return { message: '目标位置已被占用', success: false }; } if (!sourcePiece.statusTags) { sourcePiece.statusTags = []; } if (!battle.extensions) battle.extensions = {}; if (!battle.extensions.tileEffects) battle.extensions.tileEffects = []; const shadowStepSourceId = 'shadow-step-' + sourcePiece.instanceId; const existingShadowStep = sourcePiece.statusTags.find(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (existingShadowStep) { const oldX = existingShadowStep.value; const oldY = existingShadowStep.intensity; const oldTile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === oldX && t.y === oldY); if (oldTile) { oldTile.props.walkable = true; } battle.extensions.tileEffects = battle.extensions.tileEffects.filter(te => !(te.tileType === 'shadow-step' && te.sourceId === shadowStepSourceId)); existingShadowStep.value = targetPosition.x; existingShadowStep.intensity = targetPosition.y; existingShadowStep.remainingDuration = 2; } else { sourcePiece.statusTags.push({ id: 'shadow-step-' + Date.now(), type: 'shadow-step', name: '暗影步', remainingDuration: 2, value: targetPosition.x, intensity: targetPosition.y, relatedRules: ['rule-shadow-step'] }); } tile.props.walkable = false; battle.extensions.tileEffects.push({ x: targetPosition.x, y: targetPosition.y, sourceId: shadowStepSourceId, tileType: 'shadow-step', icon: '👤', bgColor: 'rgba(147, 51, 234, 0.5)', boxShadow: 'inset 0 0 4px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.5)', iconPosition: 'top-left' }); if (!sourcePiece.rules) { sourcePiece.rules = []; } const hasRule = sourcePiece.rules.some(r => r.id === 'rule-shadow-step'); if (!hasRule) { addRuleById(sourcePiece.instanceId, 'rule-shadow-step'); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '标记了暗影步位置，将在下回合开始时传送到(' + targetPosition.x + ',' + targetPosition.y + ')', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择地图上一个未被遮挡的格子，在下回合开始时自动传送', expectedValues: {} }; }
